entry.title: RES26-147 (Honolulu): INTRO → CCL
entry.content:
ACCEPTING A GIFT OF TRANSPORTATION, LODGING, MEALS, AND REGISTRATION FEES, VALUED AT $5,600, TO THE CITY FROM THE NATIONAL ASSOCIATION OF STATE PROCUREMENT OFFICIALS (NASPO) FOR TWO STAFF MEMBERS FROM THE CITY TO ATTEND THE NASPO REACH CONFERENCE AND TRAINING EVENT IN OKLAHOMA CITY, OKLAHOMA.

Status: INTRO → CCL

Latest action: Committee report and Resolution as amended were adopted.

View on the council site

entry.title: New: RES26-147 (Honolulu) — INTRO
entry.content:
ACCEPTING A GIFT OF TRANSPORTATION, LODGING, MEALS, AND REGISTRATION FEES, VALUED AT $5,600, TO THE CITY FROM THE NATIONAL ASSOCIATION OF STATE PROCUREMENT OFFICIALS (NASPO) FOR TWO STAFF MEMBERS FROM THE CITY TO ATTEND THE NASPO REACH CONFERENCE AND TRAINING EVENT IN OKLAHOMA CITY, OKLAHOMA.

Latest action: Introduced.

View on the council site
